# Roman Tsisyk – Senior Android Developer Portfolio

> Roman Tsisyk is a Senior Android Developer with 12+ years of professional software development experience and 6+ years focused on Android. He is currently employed at BetVictor, one of Europe's leading sports betting companies, and is based in Wroclaw, Poland. Roman specializes in building scalable, enterprise-grade Android applications serving 500K to 1.5M+ users, using modern Kotlin-first architectures. He has delivered impactful products for Fortune 500 companies including HP Inc and GlobalLogic (Mercedes-Benz), as well as FinTech clients in the Polish banking sector.

## About

Roman Tsisyk is a passionate Android developer with a track record of transforming complex technical requirements into elegant, high-performance mobile applications. His 12+ years of development experience spans enterprise IoT, automotive, FinTech, sports betting, and open-source tooling. He holds a Master's degree in Engineering from Ternopil National Technical University and supplements his formal education with continuous professional certifications. Roman is known for measurable performance wins — reducing app size by 60%, improving load times by 30%, and achieving 0.2% improvement in crash-free session rates. He works effectively in distributed, cross-functional teams across Poland, the UK, and beyond, and is open to senior and lead Android roles globally (remote or hybrid).

## Skills & Expertise

**Primary Languages**
- Kotlin (Expert, 95%)
- Java (Expert, 95%)
- Dart (Advanced, 78%)

**Android Core**
- Android SDK (Expert, 95%)
- Jetpack Compose (Advanced, 90%)
- Material Design 3 (Advanced, 88%)
- Android Jetpack (ViewModel, LiveData, Navigation, WorkManager)
- Wear OS

**Architecture & Patterns**
- MVVM (Expert, 92%)
- Clean Architecture (Advanced, 85%)
- MVI
- Multi-module architecture
- Dependency Injection: Hilt, Dagger 2, Koin (Advanced, 88%)

**Asynchronous Programming**
- Kotlin Coroutines (Advanced, 90%)
- Kotlin Flow (Advanced, 90%)
- RxJava

**Networking & APIs**
- Retrofit + OkHttp (Advanced, 90%)
- GraphQL
- REST APIs
- WebSockets

**Database & Storage**
- Room Database (Expert, 93%)
- SQLite (Advanced, 85%)
- DataStore
- Firebase Realtime Database / Firestore

**Hardware & IoT**
- Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) / Bluetooth 5.0
- IoT device management
- NFC

**Security & Payments**
- Cryptography (AES, RSA)
- Google Pay integration
- Biometric authentication
- Certificate pinning

**Testing**
- JUnit, Mockito, MockK
- Espresso, UIAutomator, Appium, Robolectric
- Firebase Test Lab
- 80%+ test coverage on key projects

**CI/CD & DevOps**
- GitHub Actions
- Azure DevOps / CI/CD Pipelines
- Bitrise, Jenkins, Fastlane
- Gradle

**Tools**
- Android Studio, Git, Jira, Confluence
- LeakCanary (memory profiling)
- Agile/Scrum

**Cross-Platform**
- Flutter (Advanced, 80%)
- BLoC architecture (Intermediate, 75%)

**Web / Browser Extensions**
- JavaScript, Chrome Extension API, HTML/CSS, RSS

## Featured Projects

### 1. BetVictor Apps (2024 – Present)
- Type: Sports Betting & Gaming (Enterprise)
- Company: BetVictor
- Description: Developing Android sports betting and gaming applications for one of Europe's leading online gaming companies. NDA-protected codebase.
- Technologies: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, MVVM, GraphQL
- Status: Active development; details NDA-protected
- Play Store: Not publicly linked

### 2. HP Poly Lens (2022 – 2024)
- Type: Enterprise IoT Application
- Company: HP Inc / Poly
- Description: Headset and conferencing device management application for enterprise deployments. Enables IT administrators to remotely configure, update firmware, and monitor Poly audio/video devices via Bluetooth LE.
- Key Achievements: Reduced app size by 60%, improved load time by 30%, implemented BT 5.0 audio streaming
- Technologies: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Bluetooth LE, Multi-module architecture, Firebase
- Play Store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.poly.lens
- Project Page: https://roman-tsisyk.com/projects/poly-lens/

### 3. Mercedes Adapter (2019 – 2022)
- Type: Automotive Connectivity
- Company: GlobalLogic for Mercedes-Benz
- Users: 500,000+
- Description: Vehicle connectivity adapter enabling real-time vehicle diagnostics, remote control features, and live data streaming. One of the highest-reach projects in Roman's career.
- Technologies: Kotlin, Java, Firebase, Bluetooth
- Rating: 4.5 stars (2,847+ ratings)
- Project Page: https://roman-tsisyk.com/projects/mercedes-adapter/

### 4. Kasa Stefczyka (2017 – 2019)
- Type: Mobile Banking / FinTech
- Company: GSM Billing for Kasa Stefczyka (Polish Credit Union)
- Users: 150,000+
- Description: Secure mobile banking application for one of Poland's major credit unions. Features include secure transactions, Google Pay integration, and biometric authentication.
- Technologies: Kotlin, Android Security, Google Pay, Biometrics
- Play Store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=pl.online.kasastefczyka
- Project Page: https://roman-tsisyk.com/projects/kasa-stefczyka/

### 5. Netti (Commercial Product)
- Type: Network Testing Suite
- Description: Professional-grade Android network diagnostics app with speed test, iPerf3, ping, and traceroute tools. Built for developers and network engineers.
- Technologies: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Material Design 3
- Status: Commercial product — source code not publicly available
- Project Page: https://roman-tsisyk.com/projects/netti/

### 6. FollowMyMoney (Commercial Product)
- Type: Wealth Management Platform (Germany, BaFin-regulated)
- Description: German wealth-management Android app with copy trading, star-trader portfolios, and real-time investment tracking. BaFin-regulated security.
- Technologies: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Room Database
- Status: Commercial product — source code not publicly available
- Project Page: https://roman-tsisyk.com/projects/followmymoney/

### 7. Earnly (In Development)
- Type: Tax Reporting Platform (UK)
- Description: UK tax reporting platform with integrations for QuickBooks, Sage, and Xero. Features real-time tax liability tracking for freelancers and businesses.
- Technologies: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, MVVM
- Website: https://www.earnly.co.uk/
- Project Page: https://roman-tsisyk.com/projects/earnly/

### 8. Job Recruiter (Commercial Product)
- Type: HR Tech / Recruitment
- Description: Modern Android recruitment platform connecting job seekers with employers through intelligent matching.
- Technologies: Kotlin, MVVM, Retrofit, Room Database
- Status: Commercial product — source code not publicly available
- Project Page: https://roman-tsisyk.com/projects/job-recruiter/

### 9. SMS HUB (Enterprise / GSM Billing)
- Type: SMS Management & Competitions
- Description: SMS management and competition applications with A/B testing. Achieved 80% test coverage using Firebase Test Lab.
- Technologies: Android, Firebase Test Lab, A/B Testing
- Status: Private / NDA-protected

### 10. CryptoKit (Open Source Library)
- Type: Android Security Library
- Description: Streamlined cryptographic operations for secure Android development. Provides AES/RSA encryption, decryption, and hashing utilities.
- Technologies: Kotlin, Android Keystore, Cryptography
- GitHub: https://github.com/RomanTsisyk/CryptoKit

### 11. bleX (Open Source Library)
- Type: Bluetooth LE Android Library
- Description: Advanced coroutine-based Bluetooth Low Energy library for Android. Simplifies complex BLE scan, connect, read, write, and notify operations using Kotlin Coroutines.
- Technologies: Kotlin, Coroutines, Bluetooth LE
- GitHub: https://github.com/RomanTsisyk/bleX

### 12. Sunrise-Sunset-SDK (Open Source)
- Type: Android/Wear OS SDK
- Description: Modular SDK for calculating sunrise and sunset times globally, with demo apps for Android and Wear OS.
- Technologies: Kotlin, SDK, Wear OS, Location API
- GitHub: https://github.com/RomanTsisyk/Sunrise-Sunset-SDK

### 13. Chrome Extensions Collection (6+ Extensions)
- Type: Browser Extensions (JavaScript)
- Description: Collection of free, privacy-first Chrome extensions. See full descriptions in llms-full.txt.
- Extensions page: https://roman-tsisyk.com/chrome_extention/

## Work Experience

### BetVictor (2024 – Present)
- Role: Senior Android Developer
- Industry: Sports Betting & Gaming
- Technologies: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, MVVM, GraphQL

### HP Inc / Poly (2022 – 2024)
- Role: Senior Android Developer
- Industry: Enterprise IoT / UC&C (Unified Communications)
- Product: HP Poly Lens – enterprise headset management platform
- Technologies: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Bluetooth LE, Multi-module, Firebase
- Key Metrics: 60% app size reduction, 30% faster load time, BT 5.0 audio streaming

### GlobalLogic (2019 – 2022)
- Role: Senior Android Developer
- Industry: Automotive (Tier-1 Consulting)
- Client: Mercedes-Benz
- Product: Mercedes Adapter – vehicle connectivity app
- Users: 500,000+
- Technologies: Kotlin, Java, Bluetooth, Firebase

### GSM Billing (2017 – 2019)
- Role: Android Developer
- Industry: FinTech / Banking
- Client: Kasa Stefczyka (Polish Credit Union)
- Product: Mobile banking app
- Users: 150,000+
- Technologies: Kotlin, Security frameworks, Google Pay
